stories.title: Add Maintainability Guardrails
stories.description: Add automated checks and scripts to enforce design/UI file size limits (200–500 target, 500 max), encourage modularity thresholds, and prevent separation-of-concerns regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: A command exists to check design/UI file line counts and fails if any exceed 500 lines
Design/UI file globs match AGENTS.md (app/, components/, components/ui/, global.css, constants/theme.ts, theme helpers)
Tooling output clearly lists offending files and counts
Checks are documented and runnable via npm scripts

stories.title: Modularize Chat Feature (SoC)
stories.description: Restructure chat feature into clear modules (feature folder + hooks + components), keep app routes thin, and ensure UI/business logic/services are separated.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat screen route files in app/ remain thin (render + wiring only)
Chat state/streaming orchestration lives in hooks and does not sit in UI components
UI components do not import/call services directly
Existing chat tests are updated and pass

stories.title: Split Oversized Design/UI Files
stories.description: Scan the repo for any design/UI files over 500 lines (or approaching 450) and split into smaller components/hooks/helpers, targeting 200–500 lines per AGENTS.md.
acceptanceCriteria: No design/UI file exceeds 500 lines
Large components are decomposed to <200 lines where feasible
No behavior regressions (screens render and core flows still work)
Associated tests are updated/added and pass

stories.title: Strengthen Tests & Quality Gates
stories.description: Ensure refactor work is protected with user-centric tests and that lint/test quality gates are consistently runnable for this repo.
acceptanceCriteria: Any new hook/service has unit tests covering success + failure paths
Tests prefer user-visible assertions (text/accessibility) over implementation details
Quality gate commands are documented and runnable (lint + test; optional typecheck if added)
All tests pass

stories.title: Consolidate UI Primitives & Theme Helpers
stories.description: Reduce duplication and keep design/UI files small by consolidating reusable primitives (components/ui) and theme/style helpers (constants/theme.ts + helpers).
acceptanceCriteria: Shared primitives are in components/ui and used consistently
Theme/style helpers are centralized and do not create circular imports
No design/UI file exceeds 500 lines
Lint and tests pass

stories.title: Update Docs & Contribution Workflow
stories.description: Document the organized repo structure, SoC expectations, and the required quality gates so contributors follow the same standards.
acceptanceCriteria: README documents folder ownership (app/components/hooks/services/constants) and when to create a feature folder
README documents quality gate commands (lint + test; optional typecheck if added)
Docs reflect AGENTS.md size limits and testing rules
No broken links in the documentation

legacyFeatures.title: Fix UI Dark Mode & Verify
legacyFeatures.description: Fix unreadable text in dark mode by ensuring NativeWind is correctly configured (Babel, Tailwind) and verify the fix.

legacyFeatures.title: Document-Style Inline Typing Chat
legacyFeatures.description: Replace traditional textbox with inline document-style typing (like Word/Google Docs). User types directly in the chat flow, press Enter to send. Update AI settings to temp=1.0, max_tokens=16k.
